display.purpose: Hero h1 only — paired with the animated marker underline.

headline.purpose: Section h2, always paired with a label-mono eyebrow.

title.purpose: Card titles (timeline, bonus, KPIs, mentor stat).

body-lg.purpose: Hero tagline and intro paragraphs only.

body.purpose: Default prose, FAQ answers, mentor intro.

label.purpose: Every eyebrow, chip, KPI, status label, button text.

shadows.name: cta-glow
shadows.purpose: Lime halo under the primary CTA — reads as 'plugged in'.

shadows.name: pricing-aura
shadows.purpose: The pricing card's signature double-ring violet halo.

shadows.name: panel-ambient
shadows.purpose: The single sanctioned black drop shadow, used on .dashboard-panel only.

shadows.name: active-node-violet
shadows.purpose: Timeline node active state — violet variant.

shadows.name: active-node-lime
shadows.purpose: Timeline node active state — lime variant.

shadows.name: active-node-amber
shadows.purpose: Timeline node active state — amber variant.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for reveal, hover lifts, transitions.

motion.name: ease-sweep
motion.purpose: Button hover sweep — fast in, slow out.

motion.name: marker-underline
motion.purpose: Hero h1 hand-drawn marker animates in once on load.

motion.name: aurora-drift
motion.purpose: Final CTA section background slow rotation.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The action button — lime fill on slate text, with a left-to-right sweep hover.
components.css: .ds-btn { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid transparent; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; isolation: isolate; cursor: pointer; transition: color 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -1; background: var(--fill, transparent); transform: translateX(-101%); transition: transform 600ms cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1); } .ds-btn:hover::before { transform: translateX(0); } .ds-btn-primary { color: #0a1628; background: #bef264; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.22); --fill: #a3e635; } .ds-btn .ds-arr { transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); display: inline-block; } .ds-btn:hover .ds-arr { transform: translateX(4px); } .ds-btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c4b5fd; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button (Ghost)
components.description: Ghost button with lime border that fills lime on sweep — text flips to slate mid-sweep.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; padding: 0.75rem 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.5); color: #bef264; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden; isolation: isolate; transition: color 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -1; background: #bef264; transform: translateX(-101%); transition: transform 600ms cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover::before { transform: translateX(0); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #0a1628; border-color: #bef264; } .ds-arr { display: inline-block; transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover .ds-arr { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Terminal Chip
components.description: Signature pill with lime status dot and blinking caret — used at the hero to declare 'system online'.
components.html: cohorte 1 · 7 places
components.css: .ds-term-chip { display: inline-flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.25); background: rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.05); border-radius: 999px; } .ds-term-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #bef264; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #bef264; } .ds-term-txt { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #bef264; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-term-cur { display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 12px; background: #bef264; margin-left: 2px; vertical-align: -1px; animation: ds-blink 1.1s steps(2) infinite; } @keyframes ds-blink { 0%, 50% { opacity: 1; } 50.01%, 100% { opacity: 0; } }

components.name: Label Mono Eyebrow
components.description: All-caps Geist Mono eyebrow stamp — every section opens with one, color-tinted to intent.
components.css: .ds-label-mono { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #cbd5e1; font-weight: 500; } .ds-label-mono.ds-violet { color: #c4b5fd; } .ds-label-mono.ds-lime { color: #bef264; } .ds-label-mono.ds-amber { color: #f59e0b; } .ds-label-mono.ds-white { color: #e9eef5; }

components.name: Dashboard Panel
components.description: The base reusable container — translucent slate with backdrop blur and a subtle structural border.
components.html:
Augmentation 02

Tonal layer over slate, used sparingly across the page.
components.css: .ds-panel { background: rgba(30, 41, 59, 0.42); border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 0.75rem; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); padding: 32px; transition: border-color 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 400ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-panel:hover { border-color: rgba(109, 40, 217, 0.5); } .ds-panel-title { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #e9eef5; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-panel-body { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; color: #cbd5e1; line-height: 1.55; margin: 0; }

components.name: Waitlist Input
components.description: Minimal dark input — surface background, dash-border outline, lime ring on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 16px 18px; font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #f1f5f9; background: #000000; border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #bef264; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.25); }

components.name: Bonus Card
components.description: Bonus list card — flat dark transparent surface with a tinted icon block.
components.html:
Pack templates n8n

12 workflows prêts à brancher pour tes premiers livrables.
components.css: .ds-bonus { padding: 20px 20px 22px; border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); transition: border-color 300ms, transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; } .ds-bonus:hover { border-color: rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.16); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-bonus-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 10px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-bonus-icon.ds-violet { background: rgba(196, 181, 253, 0.12); color: #c4b5fd; } .ds-bonus-icon.ds-lime { background: rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.12); color: #bef264; } .ds-bonus-icon.ds-amber { background: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.12); color: #f59e0b; } .ds-bonus-title { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #e9eef5; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.3; margin: 0; } .ds-bonus-sub { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12.5px; color: #cbd5e1; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; }

components.name: Mentor Stat
components.description: Compact KPI card — bold number with lime prefix, mono label below.
components.html:
+120k €
CA généré IA / 2 ans
components.css: .ds-stat { padding: 14px 16px 12px; border: 1px solid #1e293b; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); border-radius: 10px; transition: border-color 300ms, transform 300ms; } .ds-stat:hover { border-color: rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.4); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-stat-val { font-family: 'Geist', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #f1f5f9; letter-spacing: -0.035em; line-height: 1.05; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 2px; } .ds-stat-val .ds-stat-pre { color: #bef264; margin-right: 2px; } .ds-stat-val .ds-stat-suf { color: #cbd5e1; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; margin-left: 3px; } .ds-stat-lab { display: block; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #94a3b8; font-weight: 500; margin-top: 8px; }

components.name: Status Row
components.description: Pulsing lime dot + mono label — the 'system online' signifier under the hero CTA.
components.html: Cohorte 1 — Démarrage 15 mai 2026
components.css: .ds-status-row { display: inline-flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 1px solid #1e293b; } .ds-status-dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; background: #bef264; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(190, 242, 100, 0.7); } .ds-status-dot.ds-pulse { animation: ds-pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.35; transform: scale(0.85); } } .ds-status-lab { font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #cbd5e1; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Animated Logo Mark
components.description: Two counter-rhythm bars — lavender tall, lime short — that breathe on a 5.2s cycle. The brand mark.
components.css: .ds-logo-mark { display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 4px; height: 22px; } .ds-bar-tall { width: 5px; height: 100%; background: #c4b5fd; border-radius: 2px; transform-origin: bottom center; animation: ds-logo-tall 5.2s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1) infinite; } .ds-bar-short { width: 5px; height: 58%; background: #bef264; border-radius: 2px; transform-origin: bottom center; animation: ds-logo-short 5.2s cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-logo-tall { 0%, 10% { transform: scaleY(1); } 50%, 60% { transform: scaleY(0.58); } 100% { transform: scaleY(1); } } @keyframes ds-logo-short { 0%, 10% { transform: scaleY(1); } 50%, 60% { transform: scaleY(1.72); } 100% { transform: scaleY(1); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-bar-tall, .ds-bar-short { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: Indés Augmentés sells the promise of a freelance who pilots their business like a senior ops engineer pilots a stack — instrumented, augmented, in control. The interface borrows the visual language of that world: a dark slate canvas dotted on a 24px grid like a graph-paper terminal, monospace labels stamped above every section like log tags, a status dot that pulses lime to say system online, an ambient cursor aura that follows the reader like a focus reticle. The page reads like a control room first, a marketing site second. Two accents carry the meaning. Violet is identity, wordmarks, branding, lavender text that reads as premium. Lime is action, every primary CTA, every confirmation, every status signal. The two never compete: violet describes, lime commands. Amber appears as a third, sparing voice for warnings and FAQ heat. The system rejects the soft pastel SaaS landing template, the agency-portfolio dark template, and the AI-bootcamp neon-purple-on-black reflex.
keyCharacteristics: Dark slate canvas (#0a1628) with a 24px dot-grid texture
Geist for prose, Geist Mono for every label, KPI, chip, code-style line
Violet = identity / atmosphere. Lime = action / confirmation. Amber = alert / heat.
Tonal layering with selective ambient glows around active state, almost never structural drop-shadows
Animated micro-instrumentation: scroll progress, cursor aura, scanlines, animated logo bars, blinking carets, type-on quote
1280px max content width, generous vertical rhythm (96px between sections)

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Violet describes, Lime commands. They do not blend, do not gradient into each other across a CTA, and never both appear inside the same button.

rules.name: The Lime Means Done Rule
rules.body: If lime appears on a piece of UI, it should mean: this is the action, or the action succeeded, or the system is live. It should never decorate.

rules.name: The Amber Means Heat Rule
rules.body: Amber is reserved for stop-and-read FAQ items, struck-through old prices, and limited / soon / ending cues. Never decorative.

rules.name: The Mono Earns Its Keep Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono is reserved for type that speaks as the system: labels, KPIs, chip text, button text, log-style quotes, fine print. Never set body prose in mono. Never set h1/h2 in mono.

rules.name: The Bright-on-Bright Rule
rules.body: Headings use text-bright (#e9eef5), not pure white. Pure white on dash-slate looks acidic; the eased-down bright reads as a film print, not a screen.

rules.name: The 65–75ch Rule
rules.body: Long body paragraphs cap at ~48rem max-width. Tight columns are part of the operator-console feel.

rules.name: The Glow Means On Rule
rules.body: A colored halo means a piece of UI is in an active or primary state. Resting elements do not glow. Glow without a meaning is glitter.

rules.name: The Ghost Border Fallback
rules.body: When a container needs definition against dash-slate, use a 1px border in rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.06) to rgba(241, 245, 249, 0.16). Never a dash-border solid line on top of dash-slate, too structural.

dos: Do use text-bright (#e9eef5) for headings and text-main for body. Never pure white on dash-slate.
Do stamp every section with a Geist Mono label-mono eyebrow, color-tinted to the section's intent.
Do double the padding when a section feels crowded — 96px between sections, 32–64px inside cards.
Do earn every accent: lime means action, violet means identity, amber means heat.
Do layer with tonal shifts and ambient glows, never with crisp black drop shadows.
Do keep Geist Mono for labels, KPIs, chips, button text, log-style lines. Body prose stays in Geist sans.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion. Every blink, sweep, drift, and scanline must shut down.
donts: Don't introduce a third decorative accent. The palette is locked at violet + lime + amber-as-warning.
Don't use side-stripe borders thicker than 2px as decorative accents on cards.
Don't apply background-clip: text gradients to headings.
Don't use glassmorphism outside the four sanctioned places: the nav, the mobile menu, the .dashboard-panel reusable, the sticky mobile CTA bar.
Don't put an italic anywhere, even on the brand wordmark.
Don't drop in icon + heading + paragraph 3-up grids (the SaaS-template reflex).
Don't add em dashes. Use commas, colons, parentheses, or periods.
Don't use a second drop-shadow vocabulary outside the four sanctioned shadows.
Don't glow elements at rest. Glow is reserved for active / primary / destination states.
Don't use dash-border (#1e293b) as a thick visible line.
